# person
Someone in the user's world. Carries a role/title, `aliases:` (nicknames or shorthand they're known by
— used to auto-resolve future mentions, `CLAUDE.md` §6), and a machine-owned `## Timeline` of dated
interactions drawn from the meetings and notes that touch them.

> The `## Timeline` is **regenerated by the assistant** — appended at ingest, re-derived at distill —
> inside the generated markers below. **Don't hand-edit inside the markers**; add the fact to the
> meeting/source note instead, and it flows here (`CLAUDE.md` §8). A new `person` note starts with an
> empty fenced timeline:

## Timeline
